title: Merovingians vs Jesus vs Atlantis vs Richat Structure Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request covering the Merovingian dynasty's alleged Jesus bloodline origins, the Richat Structure as a proposed Atlantis site, and his own theory that Atlantis was actually located near Andros Island in the Bahamas, destroyed by a comet impact. He also touches on Basque language as possibly Atlantean, Celtic origins, ancient flood survival myths, and crystal skulls as potential ancient data storage.
enrichment.speaker: mixed

stances.position: Plausible but unprovable; an interesting story that doesn't go anywhere meaningful
Rejects it — Plato said Atlantis was an island in the Atlantic, not inland Mauritania
Andros Island in the Bahamas, matching Plato's dimensions (~350x250 km), destroyed by comet impact
Possibly Atlantean in origin; fun and worth believing as a speculation
Likely ancient hard drives containing historical records that governments should preserve and study
Roughly 1800s-equivalent tech but with different knowledge like rock levitation, possibly alien-assisted
